goal_description: Invite the contact to attend a free masterclass event. Get a clear commitment or understand why they can't attend.

red_flags.label: Do Not Disturb / Do Not Call

data_capture_fields.label: Preferred Date
data_capture_fields.description: Which date the contact prefers for the masterclass

data_capture_fields.label: Number of Attendees
data_capture_fields.description: How many people will attend including the contact

data_capture_fields.label: Reason for Declining
data_capture_fields.description: Primary reason if the contact declined

data_capture_fields.label: How They Heard About Us
data_capture_fields.description: How the contact learned about the company or event
